item.title: Code blocks with syntax highlighting and copy button
item.intent: All code blocks across the site must have language-aware syntax highlighting with a dark-mode-matched theme and a one-click copy button. For a developer audience reading infrastructure code, this is core readability, not polish.
item.description: Configure Astro's built-in Shiki highlighter and add a vanilla JS copy button to all <pre> blocks. Sprint must include at least one page with a rendered code block so the verify can confirm Shiki output in dist/.
steps: Configure Shiki in astro.config.mjs markdown.shikiConfig — pick a dark theme (e.g., github-dark, night-owl, or dracula) that matches the site's dark surface
Create a CopyButton component or inline <script> that adds a copy-to-clipboard button to every <pre> element
Style the copy button: positioned top-right of code block, unobtrusive, shows feedback on click
Ensure CopyCode component is imported and rendered in Base.astro so the script is included in every page
Ensure at least one content page with a code fence exists (architecture KB or series entry) so Shiki renders in the build

acceptanceCriteria.text: Code blocks render with Shiki syntax highlighting in built HTML
Copy button script is present in built output
